serviceHero.headline: TLC Insurance
serviceHero.subline: Fast, TLC-compliant coverage for Uber, Lyft, taxi, and livery drivers. Same-day binding available.

whatItCovers.headline: What TLC Insurance Covers

included.title: Commercial Liability
included.description: Covers bodily injury and property damage to passengers and third parties while the vehicle is in service.

included.title: TLC Required Minimums
included.description: Meets all NYC TLC minimum coverage requirements for FHV (For-Hire Vehicles) and taxi/livery plates.

included.title: Physical Damage
included.description: Comprehensive and collision coverage for the vehicle itself.

included.title: Uninsured Motorist
included.description: Protection when you're hit by an uninsured driver while on duty.

included.title: Medical Payments
included.description: Covers medical costs for you and passengers in the event of an accident.

excluded.title: Personal Use Gaps
excluded.description: Some TLC policies only cover commercial use. Ask us about endorsements for personal use.

excluded.title: Mechanical Breakdown
excluded.description: Normal vehicle wear and maintenance is not covered.

whatItCovers.whoNeedsIt: Any driver operating a for-hire vehicle in New York City — including Uber, Lyft, Via, yellow cab, black car, and limousine drivers — must carry TLC-approved commercial insurance. Driving without it can result in license suspension and significant fines.

points.title: Same-Day Binding
points.description: We understand TLC deadlines. We can bind your coverage the same day in most cases.

points.title: Multilingual Team
points.description: Our agents speak English, Spanish, and Chinese — making the process easier for all our TLC clients.

points.title: TLC Compliance Expert
points.description: We know TLC regulations inside and out and ensure your policy always meets current TLC requirements.

quoteProcess.headline: How to Get a TLC Quote

steps.title: Provide Your TLC License Number
steps.description: Your TLC driver license number and vehicle FHV plate number.

steps.title: Vehicle Information
steps.description: Year, make, model, and VIN of the for-hire vehicle.

steps.title: Driving History
steps.description: Any prior violations, accidents, or license suspensions.

rateFactors.headline: What Affects TLC Insurance Rates

factors.description: Newer vehicles and those with higher replacement values cost more to insure.
Moving violations and at-fault accidents significantly increase TLC premiums.
Higher liability limits cost more but provide greater protection.
Choosing a higher deductible reduces your premium but increases out-of-pocket costs after a claim.
Prior claims — especially at-fault accidents — substantially impact your rate.

tips: Maintain a clean driving record — it's the single biggest factor in your premium
Complete a defensive driving course approved by TLC
Choose the right deductible based on what you can afford to pay out of pocket
Bundle multiple vehicles if you operate a fleet

items.question: What is the minimum TLC insurance required in NYC?
items.answer: TLC requires a minimum of $100,000 per person, $300,000 per incident for FHV plates. Taxi and livery plates have different requirements. We ensure your policy meets current TLC standards.

items.question: Can I get TLC insurance if I have points on my license?
items.answer: Yes, but your options may be limited and cost higher. We work with carriers that specialize in non-standard TLC coverage for drivers with violations.

items.question: Do I need separate insurance for personal use?
items.answer: Your TLC policy may have gaps for personal use. We'll review your coverage and recommend whether an endorsement or separate personal auto policy makes sense.

items.question: How quickly can I get covered?
items.answer: In most cases, same-day. Once we have your information, we can bind coverage and provide proof of insurance to TLC the same business day.

items.question: Do you offer multi-vehicle fleet rates?
items.answer: Yes. If you own multiple FHV vehicles, we can provide fleet pricing which is typically more economical than individual policies.
